response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of strong general software engineering expertise, excellent software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, DevOps), and proven ability to architect complex systems. However, the role requires deep C++ expertise and industrial automation domain knowledge (IEC 62443, MQTT, industrial protocols, cybersecurity). The candidate's C++ experience is limited to 6 months at National Instruments; recent work focuses on JavaScript/TypeScript and web/backend systems rather than embedded or industrial systems. While the candidate could potentially learn the domain, they lack the specialized expertise needed for immediate contribution in this senior role.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack development experience with proven ability to handle complex architectural challenges and design high-performance systems across web, mobile, and embedded platforms

Strong software craftsmanship foundation including TDD, CI/CD, DevOps, and infrastructure expertise; demonstrated technical leadership through open-source projects (GISCollective) and knowledge sharing
Excellent communication and mentoring skills evidenced by multiple technical workshops, talks, and ability to create frameworks and tools for teams
concerns: Very limited recent C++ expertise (only 6 months at National Instruments in 2014-2015); primary experience over past decade is JavaScript/TypeScript and web backend development, not low-level systems programming

No demonstrated experience with industrial automation domain, IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards, or specific industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, IEC 104, DNP 3.0, OPC UA) that are core to the role
No explicit experience with MQTT protocol or message-broker-based architecture implementation; event-driven GISCollective platform does not demonstrate industrial automation requirements

key_factors.factor: Limited C++ expertise for senior role
Missing industrial automation and cybersecurity domain knowledge
Strong general software engineering fundamentals and learning capability
